title: ExaEarn Introduces Cross-Ecosystem Rewards Hub
summary: A unified rewards layer now connects ExaToken incentives across campaigns, NFT activity, and giftcard operations.

title: ExaEarn and NovaPay Announce Settlement Collaboration
summary: The partnership expands secure merchant settlement pathways for marketplace and campaign transactions.

title: Community Booster Campaign Surpasses Participation Target
summary: Participation exceeded 18,000 verified actions, unlocking additional reward multipliers for active users.

title: Security Review Window Scheduled for Marketplace Expansion
summary: A protocol-level review period is planned before next-phase NFT listing and treasury routing updates.

title: Referral Wave 3 Campaign Opens With New Reward Milestones
summary: Wave 3 introduces progressive tier milestones and improved campaign performance tracking for ambassadors.

title: ExaEarn Governance Briefing Released for Q2
summary: The latest governance note outlines product priorities, incentive tuning, and treasury transparency goals.

title: Creator Program Adds New NFT Utility Tracks
summary: New utility tracks enable creators to connect NFT ownership with campaign access and ecosystem perks.

title: Payment Infrastructure Partner Onboards Regional Rails
summary: Regional rails integration improves checkout reliability for digital goods and value exchange services.
